summary: Completed testing of Multi-Bot Architecture (Iteration 8): 5 NEW bots added (Spread, Sniper, Trade, Arbitrage, Copy Trade) + FTRX bug fix verified. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly. Bot selection screen shows 6 bot cards, each bot dashboard has proper config fields, wallets, and Start/Stop controls.

test_classes: TestBotListEndpoint (2 tests): GET /api/admin/bots returns 6 bots with required fields
TestVolumeBotStatus (2 tests): status and wallets endpoints
TestSpreadBotEndpoints (4 tests): status, config save, wallets, generate wallets
TestTradeBotEndpoints (3 tests): status with strategy selector, config save, wallets
TestCopyTradeBotEndpoints (3 tests): status with target_wallet, config save, wallets
TestGenericBotStartStop (2 tests): start/stop for new bots
TestFtrxBugFix (1 test): all wallets have balance_ftrx field

ftrx_bug_fix_verification.issue: FTRX balances only showed for wallets with SOL > 0.001
ftrx_bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Changed to check ALL wallets for FTRX balance using offline ATA derivation + batch getTokenAccountBalance

verification.wallets_with_ftrx_balance: Multiple wallets with low SOL (0.0021) showing FTRX balance (7729.02)

critical_code_review_comments: BOT_REGISTRY in server.py correctly maps all 6 bot types to their instances
Generic bot endpoints (/api/admin/bot/{bot_type}/*) properly route to correct bot class

Each bot class (spread_bot.py, sniper_bot.py, etc.) follows consistent interface: get_status(), start(), stop(), update_config(), get_wallets_info(), generate_wallets(), distribute_sol(), collect_sol()
Frontend Admin.jsx correctly handles bot selection with data-testid attributes for testing
CONFIG_FIELDS object in Admin.jsx defines proper config fields for each bot type including strategy selector for Trade Bot
FTRX bug fix in volume_bot.py get_wallets_info() now checks ALL wallets using batch getTokenAccountBalance
seed_data_creation: Generated 2 test wallets for Spread Bot during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-bot architecture fully tested. 6 bots available: volume (134 wallets), spread (2 wallets), sniper (0 wallets), trade (0 wallets), arbitrage (0 wallets), copytrade (0 wallets). Each bot has separate MongoDB collections. Generic API pattern: /api/admin/bot/{bot_type}/status, /api/admin/bot/{bot_type}/start, etc. Volume Bot still uses legacy endpoints (/api/admin/bot/status, /api/admin/wallets) but frontend handles both. FTRX bug fix verified - all wallets show FTRX balance regardless of SOL balance.

spread_bot.description: Market making bot - buys low, sells high, earns on spread

sniper_bot.description: Monitors new Raydium pools and buys tokens early

trade_bot.description: Auto-trading with price monitoring and strategies

copytrade_bot.description: Monitors whale wallets and copies their trades
